reasoning: The control SC-7(25) focuses on boundary protection by prohibiting unclassified national security system connections. In a Kubernetes context, this translates to ensuring that network boundaries are protected by default-deny NetworkPolicies for both ingress and egress traffic. Additionally, services should not be exposed using NodePort, which can allow external access. Enabling TLS on Ingress resources ensures secure connections, further protecting the boundary.
title: Boundary Protection - Boundary protection | unclassified national security system connections prohibit
